Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. An unsolicited guide to being a researcher [pdf] 150 upvotes, 21 comments
  2. Can you get root with only a cigarette lighter? (2024) 172 upvotes, 31 comments
  3. Finding all regex matches has always been O(n²) 132 upvotes, 29 comments
  4. BIO: The Bao I/O Coprocessor 107 upvotes, 26 comments
  5. Autoresearch on an old research idea 216 upvotes, 64 comments
  6. Dune3d: A parametric 3D CAD application 69 upvotes, 18 comments
  7. FCC Updates Covered List to Include Foreign-Made Consumer Routers 46 upvotes, 11 comments
  8. An incoherent Rust 79 upvotes, 23 comments
  9. Ju Ci (锔瓷): The Ancient Art of Repairing Porcelain 8 upvotes, 0 comments
  10. Chat GPT 5.2 cannot explain the German word "geschniegelt" 23 upvotes, 4 comments
  11. Trivy under attack again: Widespread GitHub Actions tag compromise secrets 134 upvotes, 48 comments
  12. Bombadil: Property-based testing for web UIs 215 upvotes, 87 comments
  13. FCC adds "routers produced in foreign countries" to covered list [pdf] 11 upvotes, 1 comments
  14. GitHub appears to be struggling with measly three nines availability 421 upvotes, 218 comments
  15. iPhone 17 Pro Demonstrated Running a 400B LLM 428 upvotes, 225 comments
  16. Printable Claude Code Cheat Sheet (auto-updated daily) 31 upvotes, 10 comments
  17. “Collaboration” is bullshit 267 upvotes, 142 comments
  18. Local Stack Archived their GitHub repo and requires an account to run 121 upvotes, 59 comments
  19. Walmart: ChatGPT checkout converted 3x worse than website 391 upvotes, 256 comments
  20. Hacker Mints $80M USD Worth of USR Stablecoins 8 upvotes, 1 comments
  21. Digs: iOS app that syncs your Discogs collection and lets you browse it offline 37 upvotes, 16 comments
  22. US and TotalEnergies reach 'nearly $1B' deal to end offshore wind projects 276 upvotes, 190 comments
  23. Migrating to the EU 802 upvotes, 620 comments
  24. How I'm Productive with Claude Code 76 upvotes, 47 comments
  25. AI Risks "Hypernormal" Science 48 upvotes, 30 comments
  26. Is it a pint? 167 upvotes, 141 comments
  27. I built an AI receptionist for a mechanic shop 190 upvotes, 211 comments
  28. America tells private firms to “hack back” 81 upvotes, 90 comments
  29. General Motors is assisting with the restoration of a rare EV1 86 upvotes, 101 comments
  30. Two pilots dead after plane and ground vehicle collide at LaGuardia 290 upvotes, 470 comments

Last generated 7:00am, 24 March 2026. Source here.
